description: Destroy tool: shared ssh_key_id-required rejection, the destroy-gate rejection, and the single DELETE once fully authorized.

cases.name: requires a dry-run assertion before deleting
cases.expect_error:
linode_sshkey_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: deletes the SSH key when authorized
